judge_reason: Description B claims a timestamp '12/31/99 18:20:41' and six black redaction bars that are completely absent from Description A, and the object's position relative to the crosshair differs.
original_image_tags: grayscale infrared (IR) or Forward-Looking Infrared (FLIR) sensor still. A central crosshair reticle is visible with horizontal and vertical lines. The number "3" is marked at the left and right ends of the horizontal reticle line. Near the center of the crosshair, a small, dark, elongated object (likely black-hot BHOT polarity) is visible against a lighter, grainy background. The object appears as a solid, slightly oval-shaped dark spot with a smaller, fainter dark mark immediately to its right.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Grainy grayscale infrared-style photograph with targeting crosshairs centered on a small dark object and a smaller dot nearby; timestamp “12/31/99 18:20:41” at lower left.*
